# Buttons

Buttons trigger actions and communicate hierarchy through variant and style.

## Anatomy

- Label: action-oriented text
- Container: fill, border, and radius
- Icon (optional): left, right, or icon-only

<Canvas>
  <Story of={ButtonStories.Default} />
</Canvas>

## Variants

Use explicit showcase stories for docs sections to avoid variant drift.

<Canvas>
  <Story of={ButtonStories.Variants} />
</Canvas>

## States

  <Story of={ButtonStories.States} />

## Typography

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Property</th>
      <th>Mobile/Tablet</th>
      <th>Widescreen</th>
      <th>Token(s)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Font size</td>
      <td>12px / 0.75rem</td>
      <td>24px / 1.5rem</td>
      <td><code>--components-button-font-size-px</code>, <code>--components-button-font-size</code></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Line height</td>
      <td>12px / 0.75rem</td>
      <td>24px / 1.5rem</td>
      <td><code>--components-button-line-height-px</code>, <code>--components-button-line-height</code></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Spacing

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Property</th>
      <th>Mobile/Tablet</th>
      <th>Widescreen</th>
      <th>Token(s)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Padding (x / y)</td>
      <td>24px / 8px</td>
      <td>32px / 12px</td>
      <td><code>--components-button-padding-l-r-px</code>, <code>--components-button-padding-t-b-px</code></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Icon-only size</td>
      <td>24px</td>
      <td>48px</td>
      <td><code>--components-button-icon-button-size-px</code></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Radius</td>
      <td>32px / 2rem</td>
      <td>32px / 2rem</td>
      <td><code>--components-button-border-radius-px</code>, <code>--components-button-border-radius</code></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Colors

<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Variant</th>
      <th>Default</th>
      <th>Hover/Focus</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>Primary solid</td><td>brand/primary + global/white text</td><td>global/white + brand/primary text</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Secondary solid</td><td>global/black + global/white text</td><td>global/white + global/black text</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Disabled</td><td>status/disabled + gray-dark text</td><td>No state swap</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Accessibility

- Use `<button>` for actions, `<a>` for navigation.
- Keep interactive targets at least 44x44px.
- Icon-only controls need accessible labels.
